decision.summary: There is still no clean new edge to add right now.
decision.rationale: Fresh daily markets for April 19 are now available and some of them are priced in a tradable range, but Beecthor's latest thesis still expects one more upside push before the clearer short setup. At current levels around 75.2k, that does not support opening a fresh bearish daily dip position yet, and forcing a bullish reach position would also be premature given the broader corrective framing. The weekly BTC $80k reach position remains open, there is no take-profit condition yet, and there is no floor setup in context, so the correct action is to hold and avoid forcing a trade.
